title: The Brave Little Rabbit
summary: Max the rabbit learns that courage means doing something even when you are scared.

title: The Clever Fox and the Magic Apple
titleZh: 聪明的狐狸和魔法苹果
summary: A clever fox discovers that sharing makes the magic apple even more powerful.

title: The Secret Garden of Friendship
summary: Lily and Mia learn that true friendship grows when we share our secrets and help each other grow.

title: The Boy Who Told the Truth
summary: Tom learns that telling the truth takes real courage, and honesty is the most treasure-worthy thing of all.

title: The Little Star Who Never Gave Up
summary: Little Star Twinkle learns that perseverance and believing in yourself can help you achieve any dream.

title: The Kind Little Fox
summary: Felix the fox befriends Holly the hedgehog, showing that kindness makes the world a better place.

title: The Curious Little Owl
summary: Oliver the owl discovers a magical crystal cave behind a waterfall, learning that curiosity is the greatest gift of all.

title: The Little Penguin Who Made a Mistake
summary: Pip the penguin accidentally breaks Mrs. Bear's window and learns that being honest takes real courage.

title: The Little Elephant Who Dreamed in Colors
summary: Ellie the elephant discovers that imagination is her unique talent and learns that everyone has something special inside them.

title: The Little Squirrel's Big Feast
summary: Sam the squirrel hoards acorns all summer but feels lonely, until he learns that sharing brings friends — and joy far greater than anything he could keep for himself.

title: The Little Bear Who Listened with His Heart
summary: Bruno the bear learns that the best way to help a friend isn't to fix their problem — it's to truly listen and show empathy.

title: The Kitten Who Found a Friend
summary: Coco the kitten moves to a new neighborhood and meets Pip the bunny, who loves to paint but is too shy to share. Together they learn that true friendship means seeing the special light in someone and helping it shine brighter.

title: The Little Mouse Who Planted Kindness
summary: Milo the mouse spreads kindness through small acts — watering flowers, finding lost glasses, leaving berries for a shy hedgehog. When a storm destroys his home, all the friends he helped come together to build him a new one, teaching him that kindness always grows and returns.

title: The Little Duckling Who Found Her Courage
summary: Daisy the duckling has a squeaky quack that makes everyone laugh. With help from Freddy the Frog, she learns that being brave doesn't mean being perfect — it means letting the world hear your voice, whatever it sounds like.

title: The Puppy Who Always Asked Why
summary: Pippin the puppy asks 'why' about everything — until his endless questions help him solve a mystery and discover that curiosity is a superpower.

title: The Little Lamb Who Told a Little Lie
titleZh: 说了一个小谎的小羊羔
summary: Lily the lamb accidentally breaks a sunflower pot and blames the wind — but the lie grows heavy in her heart. Can she find the courage to tell the truth?

title: The Little Turtle Who Never Stopped Trying
summary: Toby the turtle dreams of winning the Forest Race, but everyone says turtles are too slow. With perseverance and practice, he learns that finishing the race is its own victory.

title: The Little Cat Who Made a Mouse Friend
titleZh: 交到老鼠朋友的小猫咪
summary: Milo the kitten moves to a new town and meets Maple the mouse. Despite everyone saying cats and mice can't be friends, they discover that true friendship doesn't care about rules — it cares about how you make each other feel.
